limiter.mass_weight: positive mu_total broadcast to theta mass points
limiter.name: positive_definite_theta_increment_limiter
limiter.replaced_guard: legacy _limit_theta_by_level [200K,450K] lower-envelope clip for lower 30 levels
limiter.residual_strategy: dry-mass weighted redistribution over remaining bound room when feasible
limiter.theta_lower_bound_source: per-level origin-state horizontal minimum, floored at 0 K
limiter.theta_upper_bound_source: per-level origin-state horizontal maximum, capped at 500 K
